revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-130

Magslip resolver

Resolver

A synchro used as a calculating element in the special case of two output signals corresponding to the sine and cosine of the synchro angle and to the value of the input signal. Conversely, a synchro resolver may be used to transmit an output signal obtained by compounding two input signals respectively proportional to the sine and cosine of the synchro angle.

Reference: I.E.C. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
